name: Quick Tip
canva_prompt_template: Create a premium fitness infographic Instagram post. Brand colors: coral #E8654A, turquoise #1A7A7A, warm white #FAF7F2, charcoal #2B2B2B. Font: clean sans-serif. Headline: '{headline}'. Body text: '{body}'. Bottom: 'Laura Treto | Movement Coach | Key West'. Style: warm, premium, not generic fitness. Portrait format 1080x1350.

example.headline: Stop Stretching Cold Muscles
example.body: Dynamic warm-up activates 3x more muscle fibers than static stretching

name: Stat Highlight
canva_prompt_template: Create a bold stat-focused Instagram post. Large number/stat in coral #E8654A. Supporting text in charcoal #2B2B2B on warm white #FAF7F2 background. Gold #C5973E accent line. Stat: '{stat}'. Context: '{body}'. Bottom: '@coachlauratreto'. Portrait 1080x1350.

example.body: of desk workers report chronic back pain that could be prevented with 10 minutes of daily movement
example.cta: Free Seated Body Reset Guide in bio

name: Inspirational Quote
canva_prompt_template: Create an elegant quote card for Instagram. Quote in Playfair Display style font, coral #E8654A. Background: warm white #FAF7F2 with subtle gold #C5973E decorative elements. Quote: '{quote}'. Attribution: '{attribution}'. Bottom: '@coachlauratreto'. Portrait 1080x1350.

example.quote: Your body remembers what your mind tries to forget. Movement is how you rewrite the story.

name: Myth vs Fact
canva_prompt_template: Create a myth vs fact Instagram infographic. Split design: left side with myth crossed out in red, right side with fact in turquoise #1A7A7A. Background warm white #FAF7F2. Myth: '{myth}'. Fact: '{fact}'. Clean, premium look. Bottom: '@coachlauratreto'. Portrait 1080x1350.

example.fact: Pain is your body's warning signal. Smart training works WITH your body, not against it.

name: Client Spotlight
canva_prompt_template: Create a testimonial/client spotlight Instagram post. Warm, inviting design. Quote in elegant font on warm white #FAF7F2. Coral #E8654A accent. Client name: '{client_name}'. Quote: '{testimonial}'. Result: '{result}'. Bottom: 'Book your Movement Assessment | lauratreto.com'. Portrait 1080x1350.

example.testimonial: I never thought I'd feel this strong at 65.
